title: T-015 — Calibration record + cert upload Server Actions + SHA-256 immutability (V-MNT-10..14, §14.3)
prompt:
# T-015 — Calibration recording + cert upload

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §11.3 (V-MNT-10..14), §14.3 (21 CFR Part 11), §9.13 calibration_records, §5.1 BRCGS 7y
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `recordCalibration` and `uploadCalibrationCertificate` Server Actions. Recording emits `calibration.recorded` (or `calibration.failed` if result=FAIL → V-MNT-10 cross-module to 09-quality). Certificate upload computes SHA-256 server-side via `crypto.subtle.digest`, stores hash immutably in `calibration_records.certificate_sha256`, and writes to S3 via presigned URL flow.

## Pre-flight
Verify T-006 (calibration tables), T-001 (mnt.calib.record / mnt.calib.upload_cert perms), S3 / Supabase Storage primitive from Foundation. Verify Wave1 T-124 e-sign for §14.3 P2 path (cert signer immutability).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/calibration.ts`:
   - `recordCalibration({instrumentId, mwoId?, calibratedAt, calibratedBy, standardApplied, testPoints[{reference, measured, tolerancePct}], result, nextDueDate, notes})`:
     - V-MNT-11: nextDueDate > calibratedAt → block `CAL_NEXT_DUE_BEFORE_CALIBRATED`.
     - V-MNT-14: each test_points[].measured BETWEEN range_min AND range_max from calibration_instruments → warn (not block) with code `CAL_MEASURED_OUT_OF_RANGE`.
     - Inserts `calibration_records` row; if result='FAIL' emits outbox `calibration.failed` (cross-module to 09-quality lab_results hold candidate per V-MNT-10); else `calibration.recorded`.
   - `uploadCalibrationCertificate({recordId, fileBuffer, fileName})`:
     - Computes SHA-256 via `crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', fileBuffer)` (Node 20+ Web Crypto).
     - Uploads to S3 / Supabase Storage at `calibration-certs/<org>/<record>/<sha256>.pdf`.
     - UPDATE calibration_records SET certificate_file_url=<url>, certificate_sha256=<hash>; the column is set ONCE — subsequent updates blocked by Server Action policy (check `certificate_sha256 IS NULL` precondition).
2. RBAC: recordCalibration requires `mnt.calib.record`; uploadCalibrationCertificate requires `mnt.calib.upload_cert`.
3. Vitest covering: V-MNT-11 next_due before calibrated_at blocked; V-MNT-14 out-of-range warn but accepted; result=FAIL emits calibration.failed; SHA-256 hash matches `crypto.createHash('sha256').update(buffer).digest('hex')`; cert immutability — second upload on same recordId fails `CAL_CERT_IMMUTABLE`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/calibration.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/calibration.schema.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/calibration.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given recordCalibration with nextDueDate <= calibratedAt, when called, then fails `CAL_NEXT_DUE_BEFORE_CALIBRATED` (V-MNT-11).
2. Given recordCalibration with a test_point measured > range_max, when called, then succeeds but returns `warnings: ['V-MNT-14: measured out of range for point N']`.
3. Given recordCalibration with result='FAIL', when settled, then outbox row event_type='calibration.failed' payload includes {instrument_id, result, calibrated_at, next_due_date} (V-MNT-10 cross-module to 09-quality).
4. Given uploadCalibrationCertificate(fileBuffer), when SHA-256 is computed, then it matches Node `crypto.createHash('sha256').update(buffer).digest('hex')` reference.
5. Given a record already has certificate_sha256 set, when uploadCalibrationCertificate runs again on the same recordId, then fails `CAL_CERT_IMMUTABLE`.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest asserting all five ACs with Testcontainers + S3 mock.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/_actions/__tests__/calibration.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute SHA-256 client-side — server-side only (21 CFR Part 11 evidence chain).
- Do not allow cert mutation after upload — `CAL_CERT_IMMUTABLE` is BRCGS audit requirement.
- Do not block on V-MNT-14 — it is warn-only per PRD §11.3 (severity=warn).
- Do not skip cross-module `calibration.failed` outbox event — V-MNT-10 is a CIG (cross-module integration gap) per Auditor A.
- Do not store cert outside `org_id` scope — bucket path includes org.

pipeline_inputs.description: recordCalibration + uploadCalibrationCertificate Server Actions with V-MNT-10..14 + SHA-256 immutability + cross-module calibration.failed outbox event.
pipeline_inputs.details: BRCGS 7y retention via GENERATED retention_until (T-006). 21 CFR Part 11 SHA-256 immutability per §14.3.
